title: Vivo X300 Ultra, X300 FE India launch confirmed: Check expected price, specs, features
description: Vivo has officially teased the India launch of its next flagship lineup, the Vivo X300 Ultra and Vivo X300 FE.

title: NVIDIA-edForce tie-up targets India's growing demand for AI talent
description: The World Economic Forum identifies AI and ML specialists as the fastest-growing job category worldwide, while McKinsey estimates that generative AI could add USD 2.6–4.4 trillion to global productivity annually.

title: Meta likely to lay off 10 pc of its global workforce next month: Report
description: US tech giant Meta (formerly Facebook) is reportedly planning to lay off at least 10 per cent of its global workforce, or nearly 8,000 workers, next month.

title: MeitY forms tech-policy panel to guide AI governance group
description: The Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) on Saturday said that it has constituted a Technology and Policy Expert Committee (TPEC) to provide specialised technical and policy inputs for India’s emerging artificial intelligence governance framework.

title: Tech sector layoffs accelerate in 2026 amid AI pivot
description: Global technology firms accelerated job cuts in the first quarter of 2026, with over 73,200 layoffs by 95 companies, according to industry data.

title: India brings AI services to villages with unique DPI: Report
description: India is pairing artificial intelligence with digital public infrastructure, local‑language systems and governance safeguards, helping farmers, women and village institutions can use AI directly rather than through urban intermediaries, a report has said.

title: OnePlus Nord CE 6, Nord CE 6 Lite India launch confirmed on THIS date; What to expect
description: The company is set to launch the OnePlus Nord CE 6 and OnePlus Nord CE 6 Lite in India on May 7, 2026.

title: Why do keyboards have bumps on F and J keys? Here’s the hidden reason behind it
description: The bumps on the F and J keys are designed to help users position their fingers correctly without looking at the keyboard.

title: Largest 3D map of the Universe created: How it will help scientists and humanity
description: Largest 3D Map of Universe: It shows the positions of millions of galaxies, helping scientists understand how the universe is structured.

title: Who is Apple’s new CEO John Ternus? Key facts about his life and work
description: Apple’s new CEO: John Ternus, currently Apple’s Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering, will take charge as the new chief executive officer effective September 1, 2026.

title: Why do SIM cards have a cut on corner? Here’s the hidden reason behind it
description: Why SIM card has cut on corner: The cut corner on a SIM card is known as a “key.” Its main purpose is to ensure that the card is inserted into a phone in the correct direction.

title: Clean your earbuds like pro: 5 easy tips you can follow; 4th one is a secret hack
description: How to clean earbuds: The easiest first step is using a soft-bristled brush, like a clean toothbrush. Gently brush the outer mesh and edges of the earbuds to remove loose dust and debris.

title: Tech giants Samsung and LG hike laptop prices twice in three months
description: Samsung Electronics and LG Electronics raised laptop prices twice within a three-month period as a severe shortage of memory chips continues to impact the consumer electronics market.

title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro launched in India with 6,500mAh battery; Check price, camera, features, and performance
description: Motorola Edge 70 Pro: Motorola has launched its latest premium mid-range smartphone, the Motorola Edge 70 Pro, in India. The price starts at Rs. 38,999.

title: Asus ExpertBook Ultra launched in India: Price, features, AI capabilities and more
description: Asus has expanded its premium business laptop lineup in India with the launch of the new ExpertBook Ultra. The base variant starts at Rs 1,49,990.

title: WhatsApp prepaid mobile recharge feature launched: Here’s how you can use it
description: WhatsApp prepaid mobile recharge: WhatsApp has introduced a new feature that allows users to recharge their prepaid mobile numbers directly within the app.

title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT 5.5 with 82.7% accuracy, can handle tasks end-to-end
description: The company said the biggest leap is in agentic coding and computer. On Terminal-Bench 2.0, which tests complex command-line workflows requiring planning and tool coordination, GPT-5.5 hits 82.7% accuracy -- a new state-of-the-art.

description: Industry is increasingly leveraging AI-powered tools such as chatbots, CRM and ERP integrations, and no-code platforms to simplify operations for small businesses.

description: According to the WEF, in a proven deployment scenario, robotics advances steadily within structured environments like ports, logistics, and mining where outcomes are predictable.

description: The court is expected to deliver its decision in the coming weeks, a ruling that could have broader implications for the governance and funding models of AI companies.

title: NVIDIA-edForce tie-up targets India's growing demand for AI talent | Technology News | Zee News
description: The World Economic Forum identifies AI and ML specialists as the fastest-growing job category worldwide, while McKinsey estimates that generative AI could add USD 2.6–4.4 trillion to global productivity annually.

title: Meta likely to lay off 10 pc of its global workforce next month: Report | Technology News | Zee News
description: US tech giant Meta (formerly Facebook) is reportedly planning to lay off at least 10 per cent of its global workforce, or nearly 8,000 workers, next month.

title: MeitY forms tech-policy panel to guide AI governance group | Technology News | Zee News
description: The Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) on Saturday said that it has constituted a Technology and Policy Expert Committee (TPEC) to provide specialised technical and policy inputs for India’s emerging artificial intelligence governance framework.

title: Tech sector layoffs accelerate in 2026 amid AI pivot | Technology News | Zee News
description: Global technology firms accelerated job cuts in the first quarter of 2026, with over 73,200 layoffs by 95 companies, according to industry data.

title: India brings AI services to villages with unique DPI: Report | Technology News | Zee News
description: India is pairing artificial intelligence with digital public infrastructure, local‑language systems and governance safeguards, helping farmers, women and village institutions can use AI directly rather than through urban intermediaries, a report has said.

title: OnePlus Nord CE 6, Nord CE 6 Lite India launch confirmed on THIS date; What to expect | Technology News | Zee News
description: The company is set to launch the OnePlus Nord CE 6 and OnePlus Nord CE 6 Lite in India on May 7, 2026.

title: Why do keyboards have bumps on F and J keys? Here’s the hidden reason behind it | Technology News | Zee News
description: The bumps on the F and J keys are designed to help users position their fingers correctly without looking at the keyboard.

title: Largest 3D map of the Universe created: How it will help scientists and humanity | Technology News | Zee News
description: Largest 3D Map of Universe: It shows the positions of millions of galaxies, helping scientists understand how the universe is structured.

title: Who is Apple’s new CEO John Ternus? Key facts about his life and work | Technology News | Zee News
description: Apple’s new CEO: John Ternus, currently Apple’s Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering, will take charge as the new chief executive officer effective September 1, 2026.

title: Why do SIM cards have a cut on corner? Here’s the hidden reason behind it | Technology News | Zee News
description: Why SIM card has cut on corner: The cut corner on a SIM card is known as a “key.” Its main purpose is to ensure that the card is inserted into a phone in the correct direction.

title: Clean your earbuds like pro: 5 easy tips you can follow; 4th one is a secret hack | Technology News | Zee News
description: How to clean earbuds: The easiest first step is using a soft-bristled brush, like a clean toothbrush. Gently brush the outer mesh and edges of the earbuds to remove loose dust and debris.

title: Tech giants Samsung and LG hike laptop prices twice in three months | Technology News | Zee News
description: Samsung Electronics and LG Electronics raised laptop prices twice within a three-month period as a severe shortage of memory chips continues to impact the consumer electronics market.

title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro launched in India with 6,500mAh battery; Check price, camera, features, and performance | Technology News | Zee News
description: Motorola Edge 70 Pro: Motorola has launched its latest premium mid-range smartphone, the Motorola Edge 70 Pro, in India. The price starts at Rs. 38,999.

title: Asus ExpertBook Ultra launched in India: Price, features, AI capabilities and more | Technology News | Zee News
description: Asus has expanded its premium business laptop lineup in India with the launch of the new ExpertBook Ultra. The base variant starts at Rs 1,49,990.

title: WhatsApp prepaid mobile recharge feature launched: Here’s how you can use it | Technology News | Zee News
description: WhatsApp prepaid mobile recharge: WhatsApp has introduced a new feature that allows users to recharge their prepaid mobile numbers directly within the app.

title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT 5.5 with 82.7% accuracy, can handle tasks end-to-end | Technology News | Zee News
description: The company said the biggest leap is in agentic coding and computer. On Terminal-Bench 2.0, which tests complex command-line workflows requiring planning and tool coordination, GPT-5.5 hits 82.7% accuracy -- a new state-of-the-art.

title: AI-led small and medium business platforms see growth push; BusinessBay.io says India emerges key market for digital business tools | Technology News | Zee News
description: Industry is increasingly leveraging AI-powered tools such as chatbots, CRM and ERP integrations, and no-code platforms to simplify operations for small businesses.

title: Next 5 years will shape robotics future: WEF warns of diverging global paths | Technology News | Zee News
description: According to the WEF, in a proven deployment scenario, robotics advances steadily within structured environments like ports, logistics, and mining where outcomes are predictable.
